metadata.title: Meezan Bank | The Premier Islamic Bank
metadata.description: Welcome to Meezan Bank, Pakistan's first and largest Islamic bank that offers a range of Shariah-compliant products to cater your financial needs.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Calculators ATM & Branch Locator IBAN Generator Knowledge Centre News & Updates Contact Us Placement of Financial Statements for the year ended December 31, 2025 Meezan Bank Pakistan and Bank CenterCredit Kazakhstan Sign MoU to Enhance Correspondent Banking and Bilateral Trade Meezan Bank Expands Correspondent Banking Network with PKR Vostro Account for Freedom Bank Kazakhstan Open a Digital Account You can open a Meezan Bank Account straight from our Meezan Digital Account Opening App - it's simple, safe and secure Debit Cards Discounts Find the latest Meezan Card promotions here. Simply select your location to view a list of exciting discounts and privileges on your Meezan Debit Cards! Debit Cards Keep your money securely in your card and enjoy great discounts and convenient accessibility Accounts For Freelancer Avail the opportunity to have your own full-fledged Savings/Current account Ways to Bank with Us Branches Get state-of-the-art branch banking services. ATMs Enjoy a host of banking services round-the-clock! Internet Banking Simple, hassle-free way to bank, anytime, anywhere! Mobile Banking Is NOW Available! Convenience at the touch of a button. Debit Cards Which Debit Card is right for you? Call Centre Our Bank is available 24/7 for you Awards & Recognition Learn More Service Desk – Click Me Meezan Bank is Pakistan’s premier Islamic bank, operating with more than 1000 branches in over 320 cities across the country. The Bank has been recognized by various local and international institutes on several occasions for its phenomenal year-on-year growth and contribution to the domain of Islamic finance in the region. Meezan Bank has been acknowledged as the Best Bank of Pakistan for the third time at the Pakistan Banking Awards – 2023, the most prestigious awards in the country’s financial sector. The award ceremony is held by the Institute of Bankers Pakistan, in partnership with the Dawn Media Group and in collaboration with A.F. Ferguson and Company. The judging panel, consisting of highly respected luminaries with substantial experience in the financial sector, was chaired by Mr. Syed Salim Raza, Former Governor of the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP). Premier Islamic Bank – Meezan Bank, Pakistan’s first and largest Islamic bank that offers a range of Shariah-compliant products and services to cater your financial needs. The Bank operates strictly under the principles of Islamic Shariah and is well-recognized for its product development capability, Islamic banking research and advisory services. Car Ijarah is Meezan Bank’s car financing product and is Pakistan’s first Interest-free car financing. It is based on the Islamic financing mode of Ijarah (leasing). This product is ideal for individuals who want to get interest-free financing for acquiring a car. Easy Home – Islamic House Finance is a completely interest (Riba) free solution to your home financing needs. Unlike a conventional house loan, Meezan Bank’s Easy Home works through the Diminishing Musharakah where you participate with Meezan Bank in joint ownership of your property. Bike Ijarah is Pakistan’s first Riba-free motorcycle financing facility which of Ijarah (leasing). Freelancers can now open an account with Meezan Bank! MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more
